long_description: Got PD for Datapath 500s for Metadata Contention with systemic latency impact in us-east is critical along with Accessor Outlier Alert: Single accessor outlier osscargwdc0414b.softlayer.local in wdc04 rg p4 access pool. 4 accessers were found down. We brought up the accessers to mitigate the issue.
short_description: High latencies & 500s Metadata contention on wdc04
close_notes:
To mitigate the issue, the DSNET-Core service was terminated and restarted on the following accesser nodes:
osscargwdc0413b.softlayer.local
osscargwdc0414a.softlayer.local
osscargwdc0415a.softlayer.local
osscargwdc0415b.softlayer.local
